div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: YES

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: NO

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Takes deposits / lends from deposits

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Acts as / carries on the business of trustee

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Company formation / nominee / resident-rep / corp admin for profit

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is itself a collective investment vehicle

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Administers funds for others

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Deals/arranges/manages/advises/safeguards/promotes investments

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Money transmission / FX / cheque-cashing / payment services

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Issues/exchanges/custodies digital assets

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: YES

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: NO

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Bermuda entity / activity — which BMA licence?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Insurance / reinsurance / captive / ILS?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Route to bermuda-insurance-specialist
(Insurance Act 1978 + class/capital tree)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: What is the PRIMARY licensable activity?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BANKING — Banks and Deposit Companies Act 1999
licence: banking / deposit company / restricted banking (s.14)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TRUST — Trusts (Regulation of Trust Business) Act 2001
licence: unlimited / limited (s.11)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CORPORATE SERVICES — Corporate Service Provider Business Act 2012
licence: unlimited / limited (s.2(2) defines the business)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
INVESTMENT FUND — Investment Funds Act 2006
Authorised (Institutional/Administered/Specified-Jurisdiction/Standard)
or Registered (Prof. Class A s.6A / Class B s.7 / Private / Prof. Closed)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FUND ADMINISTRATION — Fund Administration Provider Business Act 2019
(IFA Part III)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
INVESTMENT BUSINESS — Investment Business Act 2003
Licensed / Class A Registered / Class B Registered / Non-Registrable

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: MONEY SERVICE BUSINESS — Money Service Business Act 2016

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
DIGITAL ASSET BUSINESS — Digital Asset Business Act 2018
Class T (test) / M (modified) / F (full)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Does the entity carry on MORE THAN ONE
licensable activity?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Each activity is a SEPARATE licensing question
(an entity can hold multiple BMA licences) —
resolve each, then check for NRP/exemption overlaps

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Single sector — fix the licence CLASS within it
(class drives capital/net-asset + Code obligations)
